name: Up
one_liner: Slick app-based bank with smart spending insights, no fees, and a referral bonus.
benefit: Free everyday account; smart spending categorisation; 2Up joint account feature; competitive Saver rate; no international transaction fees on Visa; integrates with Apple Pay and Google Pay.
signup_bonus: ~$10 bonus for new customers signed up via a referral link (check current terms)
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral link from OzBargain's Up Bank referral thread
Download the Up app (iOS or Android) and sign up using the referral link
how_to_join.detail: Requires AU phone number; identity is verified entirely in-app.

how_to_join.action: Activate your Visa debit card when it arrives in the post
Open a Saver account to earn bonus interest on top of the base rate

risks: Signup bonus is small (~$10) — the main value is ongoing fee-free banking and no FX fees
Up is backed by Bendigo Bank (APRA-licensed ADI); deposits are government-guaranteed up to $250,000
Referral bonus terms change — verify at time of signup
est_value: ~$10 signup bonus + fee-free banking with no FX fees on international purchases
